posts.author: james_wooldridge (James)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently the “Sync questions and column titles” is turned “on” by default. This means I regularly accidentally change column titles, especially because new form creation opens into the “edit” tab where I can modify the questions.

What are you trying to achieve

Default the “Sync questions and column titles” to “off”, to prevent unwanted column changes.
